ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller involved in the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer involved in the transaction */,
  "revenues" TEXT /* Revenues or employee count of the seller */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Selling price of the transaction */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was announced */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector related to the transaction */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of transaction (M&A, Merger, Acquisition) */,
  "deal_size" TEXT /* Size of the deal (Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the seller */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the seller headquarters */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (Private, Public, Non-Profit) */,
  "-founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the seller company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the seller company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the buyer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the buyer headquarters */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (Private, Public, Non-Profit) */,
  "-founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the buyer company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the buyer company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (M&A, Merger, Acquisition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_dates" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related transaction */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date of the announcement */,
  "announcement_type" TEXT /* Type of announcement (e.g., deal announcement, completion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_dates_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial summary */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related transaction */,
  "revenues" TEXT /* Revenues or employee count of the seller */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Selling price of the transaction */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial summary */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income of the seller company */,
  "ebitda" TEXT /* EBITDA of the seller company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_summary_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., M&A, Finance) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deal_status_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of external data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related transaction */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date of the data feed */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data from the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
